summary: Cycle C (3rd cron fire of UTC 2026-05-24; cycle B closed 2026-05-24T06:02:30Z, cycle C opens 07:00:54Z = ~58 min wall-clock gap; regen-all heartbeat at 07:02:30Z = ~60.5 min delta — reinforces cycle B's bimodal-cadence diagnosis with 2nd consecutive ~1h gap post-cycle-A). Cycle B's downgrade of cycle A's 'ESTABLISHED ~5h' claim is reinforced — cycle C's ~60.5 min B→C is the 2nd consecutive ~1h gap post-cycle-A. Five observations total since cycle A reset: M→A ~5h, A→B ~53min, B→C ~60.5min. Bimodal/multimodal framing preferred over single-mode-with-phase-change. Carry-over #1 holds at 21st observation. (2) TOKEN THRESHOLD PERSISTS first time across cycles. Cumulative tokens_consumed_since_last_rest = ~155k (125k cycle B close + ~30k cycle C). thresholds_crossed=['tokens_consumed'] PRESERVED not re-crossed. Per cycle A's pre-decision + cycle B's option (d): cycle C held status=active surfacing via this reason='wellness-threshold-rest-suggested' for 2nd consecutive cycle. Forward-look: option (d) means counter grows monotonically without action — at this rate 200k at cycle E-F, 300k at cycle H-I — threshold signal degrades. Founder-decision still LIVE: (a) reset tokens per cron fire, (b) raise threshold, (c) auto-trigger rest when crossed-while-active, (d) leave convention (current path). (3) NO FOUNDER ACTIVITY in B→C window — most recent commit is c2001b51 cron-auto-regen from cycle B close (~06:56:45Z); ~58 min quiet pre-cycle-C-open; consistent with Founder asleep. (4) UNTRACKED TREE +1 vs cycle B — six items (was 5): new file overnight-agent/reports/2026-05-24.md (morning-report stub from independent overnight-agent system; informational mismatch since systems are independent capture paths); all left alone per isolation discipline. (5) USER-CONTEXT-GATE STALE-COUNTER independently corroborates ~1h gap — delta 13194.1 → 13254.6 min = +60.5 min (would need +300 min for ~5h gap). Two independent measurements agree the gap is ~1h; method reproducible per cycle B. WELLNESS: status=active throughout (no rest triggered). Counters: tokens accumulate continuously (~155k cumulative, threshold-crossed-persisted); hours_active discrete-context (0.5h). Single yellow user-context-gate continues. Metric-integrity attestation: HONEST. No new self-correction this cycle (cycle B's bimodal-cadence downgrade reinforced not overcalibrated); cadence corroboration via two independent measurements; threshold-persistence surfaced proactively with forward-look on option-(d) signal degradation. Continuation-discipline 5-question check ran cleanly; Condition A (queued work complete) + G (runbook explicit exit-clean for empty-inbox cycle) cited; stop-decisions NDJSON appended.
